assessment.note: She said the recent push was tolerable only as an exception, which signals strain around how work is being run and some pullback from sustaining that mode.

new_queue.label: Normal pace
new_queue.name: You said 'that pace' — what made it unsustainable for you?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific cost of the recent push so the manager can distinguish temporary effort from a real capacity problem.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Trade-offs now
new_queue.name: What are you choosing to say no to this week?
new_queue.description: Forces a concrete prioritisation trade-off instead of a generic priorities recap.

new_queue.label: Visible ownership
new_queue.name: Where do you want more visible ownership on the frontend work?
new_queue.description: Gets at recognition and influence without asking whether she feels appreciated.

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually help this fortnight?
new_queue.description: Turns the check-in toward concrete manager help rather than vague reassurance.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes on practical next steps that reduce load or friction without opening a new topic.
